system.description:
When you **_assert dominance over another (beast, spirit, Fae, or person)_**, roll +WIS: **_on a 7+_**, they must pick 1 from the list below; **on a 10+**, you also have advantage on your next roll against them.

- Accept your authority, at least for now
- Slink away or flee, then avoid you
- Fight you for dominance

success.value: They pick 1 from the list and you have advantage on your next roll against them.
